data.title: BNB Chain Launches Good Vibes Only Hackathon
data.description: BNB Chain has announced the launch of an 8-day Good Vibes Only Hackathon, running from January 22nd to 29th, 2026. This hackathon focuses on Vibe Coding and is open to all, even non-experienced developers. There are no strict themes required; all project ideas, development progress, and demos will be publicly available on X and GitHub throughout the event. Projects must create an X and GitHub account during the event and complete at least one on-chain transaction on BNB Chain (BSC / opBNB). The final selection will be based on a combination of community voting (50%) and sponsor judging (50%), with each winning project receiving a $1,000 prize. The prize pool will increase with sponsorship.

data.title: CZ: It is recommended to seek a near-optimal balance between spending, saving, and investing when you are young.
data.description: CZ posted on the X platform, stating that this is a profound topic. People typically have lower earning power when they are young and need to strike a balance between spending, saving, and investing (financial or self-investment). The key is finding a near-optimal balance. The book *Die with Zero* explores this topic in more detail.

data.title: Farcaster Acquired by Neynar Amid Decline in User Activity
data.description: Farcaster, a decentralized social protocol previously valued at nearly $1 billion, has been acquired by Neynar following a notable decrease in user engagement and revenue. According to NS3.AI, the founders, Dan Romero and Varun Srinivasan, have departed after facing controversial challenges and costly errors, despite securing $180 million in funding. The platform's future now depends on a shift towards a developer-centric approach, as opinions among the community and investors remain divided regarding the prospects of Web3 social networks.

data.title: Former PayPal president: Bitcoin will become the native currency for AI agents.
data.description: A former PayPal president stated that Bitcoin will become the native currency for AI agents, and indicated that it will run on top of BTC in the future. (The Bitcoin Historian)

data.title: Emerging Markets Surge Amid Global Tensions and Economic Shifts
data.description: Emerging market stocks, currencies, and precious metals are experiencing a strong momentum as tensions between the U.S. and Europe weaken the dollar. According to Foresight News, investors are flocking to emerging market funds at a record pace, driving up the MSCI Emerging Markets Index and boosting Asian currencies. This trend is largely fueled by robust global growth, a surge in AI spending, political transitions in Latin America, and stable fiscal and monetary policies in emerging markets. TCW Group CEO Katie Koch noted that investors are seeking to diversify away from U.S. Treasuries, describing this shift as a 'quiet quitting' from American bonds.

data.title: Bitcoin Predicted to Become Native Currency for AI Agents
data.description: Bitcoin is anticipated to serve as the native currency for AI agents, according to ChainCatcher. The former president of PayPal has expressed that future operations will be conducted on the Bitcoin network.

data.title: Bitcoin's Valuation Against Gold Indicates Potential Buying Opportunity
data.description: Bitcoin is currently considered the most undervalued relative to gold in its history, according to a recent analysis. According to NS3.AI, a robust predictive model has consistently demonstrated strong accuracy, indicating a significant mean reversion in Bitcoin's value. This situation presents a potential historic buying opportunity for investors evaluating Bitcoin's valuation against gold.

data.title: Bitcoin's Historic Undervaluation Against Gold Signals Potential Opportunity
data.description: Plan C posted on X. The current market conditions suggest a significant mean reversion for Bitcoin, according to recent analysis. The model, which has maintained a high R-squared value over time, is expected to remain robust. However, the present undervaluation of Bitcoin when compared to gold is noted as the largest and most significant in its history. This situation could present a historic opportunity for investors.

data.title: Fashion Group Hyungji Partners with Arbitrum Foundation for Stablecoin Payment System
data.description: South Korean apparel company Fashion Group Hyungji has entered into a memorandum of understanding with Arbitrum Foundation to create a digital payment system based on stablecoins. According to NS3.AI, the collaboration seeks to integrate stablecoin payments within Hyungji's distribution networks both domestically and internationally. This initiative is anticipated to enhance payment convenience and lower transaction costs.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Advocates for Enhanced Computing Self-Sovereignty by 2026
data.description:
Ethereum cofounder Vitalik Buterin has declared 2026 as the year to reclaim computing self-sovereignty, beginning with his own devices. According to Cointelegraph, Buterin outlined the software changes he implemented to reduce dependency on centralized, data-intensive platforms. In a post on X, he highlighted two significant software shifts made in 2025: transitioning almost entirely to Fileverse, a decentralized document platform akin to a privacy-focused Google Docs, and decisively adopting Signal as his primary messaging application. Signal is known for its default end-to-end encryption for all chats and minimal metadata storage, contrasting with Telegram, which only offers optional end-to-end encryption in "secret chats" and retains messages and metadata on its servers. This model has faced scrutiny amid rising law enforcement data requests in countries like France.

In 2026, Buterin has further distanced himself from centralized services by switching from Google Maps to OpenStreetMap via OrganicMaps and from Gmail to Proton Mail, while also prioritizing decentralized social media. He has explored locally hosting large language models, arguing against the necessity of sending data to third-party services when users can increasingly run AI tools on their own hardware. Although he acknowledges the need for improved user interfaces, integrations, and efficiency to make local models a seamless default, he notes significant progress compared to a year ago.

Buterin's stance aligns with privacy advocate and NBTV founder Naomi Brockwell, who has long promoted privacy-enhancing practices. Brockwell emphasizes that privacy is about autonomy rather than secrecy, advocating for tools like Bitcoin, encrypted messengers, and self-hosted services to mitigate government and corporate surveillance. Buterin's post coincides with ongoing debates over governmental and platform access to private communications and metadata. The European Union's controversial Chat Control proposal, which initially included pre-encryption message scanning to detect abusive content, has sparked warnings from civil liberties groups and technologists about the potential erosion of trust in encrypted applications. According to Buterin and other privacy advocates, progressively replacing everyday apps with encrypted, open-source, and local alternatives is a viable strategy for users to regain control over their data flows.

data.title: CertiK Plans IPO to Lead Web3 Infrastructure
data.description:
During the 2026 World Economic Forum (WEF) annual meeting, CertiK founder Gu Ronghui revealed in an interview with CBS that the company is actively pursuing plans to go public, aiming to become the leading Web3 infrastructure stock. According to Odaily, CertiK, recognized as the world's largest Web3 security firm, is making significant strides in its listing efforts.

In the interview, Gu also unveiled CertiK's core security technology, the Spoq engine, which deeply integrates AI. By merging AI with formal verification systems, this engine significantly enhances the scalability and execution efficiency of formal verification.

CertiK's innovative achievements have been validated by prestigious global academic conferences such as OSDI 2023 and ASPLOS 2026. By transforming top-tier academic research into productivity tools, CertiK is providing mathematical-level security assurance to institutional clients worldwide.

data.title: Vitalik Discusses Crypto Cultural Differences Between China and the U.S.
data.description: Vitalik Buterin recently addressed the topic of crypto cultural differences between China and the U.S. during a decentralized social discussion organized by Firefly. According to Odaily, he highlighted that Chinese-speaking developers excel in creating excellent user experiences, particularly in front-end interfaces. A few years ago, there were fewer startups related to Layer 1 and wallets, but this situation has changed significantly, with foundational protocols and infrastructure now being relatively abundant. Thanks to the improvement in foundational infrastructure and the emergence of AI, there are more opportunities to develop applications. Additionally, he mentioned that there is no need to create a new Farcaster, but rather to develop a Farcaster client.

data.title: River has completed a $12 million strategic funding round, with participation from Maelstrom Fund, The Spartan Group, and others.
data.description: River has announced the completion of a $12 million strategic funding round, with investors including Tron DAO, Justin Sun, Maelstrom Fund (founded by Arthur Hayes), The Spartan Group, and several Nasdaq-listed companies in the US and Europe. This funding will be used to accelerate ecosystem deployment, enhance stablecoin liquidity, and promote the integration of satUSD in trading, lending, staking, and yield scenarios. River plans to launch yield products for retail and institutional investors, including Smart Vault and Prime Vault, providing a unified yield acquisition interface through protocol-native and institutional-grade strategies.

data.title: VItalik: The advantage of developers in the Chinese-speaking region lies in creating user experience on the front end; they don't need to develop Farcaster, they can develop Farcaster clients.
data.description: In response to the question raised by Jocy, founding partner of IOSG, regarding the "differences in crypto culture between China and the US," Vitalik Buterin stated at the Firefly-organized Chinese-language decentralized social discussion Space that the advantage of Chinese-speaking developers lies in creating a good user experience, especially in front-end interfaces. A few years ago, there were relatively few startups related to L1 cryptography and wallets, but this situation is now drastically different; underlying protocols and infrastructure development are relatively redundant. Thanks to the improved underlying infrastructure and the emergence of AI, we can actually create more applications. Furthermore, he mentioned, "We don't need to build our own Farcaster; we can build our own Farcaster client."

data.title: The SEC and CFTC will hold a joint event next Tuesday to discuss making the U.S. the global cryptocurrency capital.
data.description: The SEC and CFTC will hold a joint event next Tuesday to discuss making the U.S. the global cryptocurrency capital. (Solid Intel)

data.title: CertiK founder Gu Ronghui speaks at Davos: AI empowers formal verification, aiming for an IPO.
data.description: During the 2026 World Economic Forum (WEF) Annual Meeting, CertiK founder Ronghui Gu revealed in an interview with CBS in Davos that CertiK, as the world's largest Web3 security company, is actively pursuing its IPO plan, striving to become the "first listed company in Web3 infrastructure." In the interview, Gu also unveiled CertiK's core security technology—the Spoq engine, which deeply integrates AI. By merging AI with a formal verification system, this engine significantly improves the scalability and execution efficiency of formal verification. Reportedly, CertiK's cutting-edge achievement has been validated at top global academic conferences such as OSDI 2023 and ASPLOS 2026. By transforming cutting-edge academic research into productivity tools, CertiK is providing mathematical-level security assurance to institutional clients worldwide.

data.title: Vitalik commented on Binance Square: Limited attention, unclear about the content quality, but looking forward to improvements in the interactivity and operability of decentralized communities.
data.description: In response to a community member's question about "how to view exchange social products like Binance Square," Vitalik stated at the Firefly-organized Chinese-language decentralized social discussion Space that he had previously paid limited attention and was unaware of the specific quality of the content. In his view, it's fine for exchanges to create social products, but it's clearly unreasonable for companies and platforms worldwide to do so. He hopes that similar platforms will develop their own unique features or niche themes in the future. He added that if a high-quality decentralized social platform exists, he would be happy to integrate his blog content and use it. He hopes that in the future, different companies and platforms can connect to an interoperable decentralized social system to communicate and connect with people worldwide.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Highlights Wallets' Role in Decentralized Social Networks
data.description: Vitalik Buterin has underscored the significance of wallets in decentralized social networks, focusing on privacy and user interface accessibility. According to NS3.AI, Buterin observed that numerous users of decentralized social applications equipped with integrated wallets have not fully interacted with the Ethereum ecosystem. He supports the option for users to switch between various wallet applications to maintain their rights to self-custody and control over their private keys.

data.title: Significant Transfer of TON Tokens Observed
data.description: A substantial movement of TON tokens has been reported. According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham indicates that at 15:52, 1,386,800 TON tokens were transferred from Kiln to an anonymous address beginning with Uf9UjA9S. Subsequently, this address moved the same amount of TON tokens to another destination.
